clues: A large Excel workbook takes several minutes to recalculate after any change.
The status bar shows 'Calculating: (8 processors): 100%' for an extended period.
The workbook contains thousands of complex formulas including VLOOKUPs and SUMPRODUCTs.
Opening the same file on a different computer of similar specification is just as slow.
The workbook uses many volatile functions like NOW(), TODAY(), and RAND().
